chunks.page_summary: This document is a Certificate of Conformance from Rheonics, certifying that its products comply with the RoHS Directive 2015/863 (RoHS3).
chunks.extracted_text:
Certificate of Conformance
RoHS
RoHS Directive 2015/863(RoHS3)

Products Covered:
All the products manufactured by Rheonics
Unless the product is specifically stated
Otherwise
(Note: This is a general Certificate - Please Contact if
you require a Product Specific Declaration)

We hereby certify that the products listed above conform to the
requirements of the European Union's Restrictions on the use of Certain
Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment (RoHS) Directive
2015/863 (RoHS 3). The products comply with the specified limits for
hazardous substances as defined in the directive.

Signed:
Place, Date:
Winterthur, March 2017

Name: Dr. Sunil Kumar
Position: CEO
key_facts: Rheonics certifies that all its manufactured products (unless otherwise stated) conform to the RoHS Directive 2015/863 (RoHS3).
The products comply with the European Union's Restrictions on the use of Certain Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment (RoHS) Directive 2015/863 (RoHS 3).
The certification was signed by Dr. Sunil Kumar, CEO, in Winterthur in March 2017.
warnings_notes: Note: This is a general Certificate - Please Contact if you require a Product Specific Declaration.
